overall.description: A red Bugatti flying car navigates through a futuristic cyberpunk city, starting in a neon-lit water canal, transitioning to highway level, and finally soaring high above the urban landscape with industrial districts and mountains in the distance. The footage showcases high-quality game engine graphics with ray-traced reflections and neon lighting characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit water canal through commercial district

events.description: begins flying low over the water canal between cyberpunk buildings
navigates a turn in the narrow waterway

agents.ego_description: piloting the flying car low over water, maneuvering through tight urban canyon with neon signs

entered.detail: dark reflective water surface between concrete walls
large glowing purple advertisement on building facade
tall building with vertical blue light strip
industrial dock structure with metal railings
elevated highway crossing over the canal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a red flying car navigating a narrow water canal flanked by cyberpunk architecture. Neon billboards and glass towers line the route as the vehicle flies low over the dark water, making a turn past concrete dock structures.

events.description: exits water canal and ascends to highway level
accelerates while climbing above the highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: ascending from the water canal to fly along elevated highways, passing industrial petrochemical facilities

entered.detail: multi-lane highway with moving traffic below the flying car
complex overpass structure with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The car transitions from the water canal to fly alongside elevated highways, ascending past industrial buildings including a prominent PETROCHEM facility. The environment shifts from neon-lit commercial to industrial infrastructure with storage tanks and overpasses.

events.description: reaches high altitude providing panoramic view of the city
flies over dense highway interchange with distant mountains visible

agents.ego_description: flying at high altitude over the sprawling city, navigating between skyscrapers with distant mountains visible on the horizon

notable_agents.action: another flying vehicle visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: desert mountain range on the horizon
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and towers

segments.scene_description: Soaring high above the city, the flying car navigates between towering skyscrapers with a vast urban sprawl and distant mountains visible. The camera captures panoramic views of the cyberpunk metropolis, industrial smokestacks, and complex highway interchanges far below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a neon-lit water canal into the expansive heights of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis. It begins with a red flying car navigating low over dark water, gliding past glass towers and glowing billboards within a narrow urban corridor. As the vehicle makes a turn past concrete docks, the scene shifts upward and away from the commercial district to fly alongside elevated highways and industrial infrastructure, passing a prominent PETROCHEM facility and storage tanks. The camera then continues its ascent, soaring high above the city to reveal a vast urban sprawl characterized by towering skyscrapers and complex highway interchanges. Finally, the perspective opens into a panoramic view of the entire metropolis, with industrial smokestacks and distant mountains framing the horizon.
